zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Kirkham於1406年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Robert Kirkham33歲，母親Agnes de Hankeford27歲。他於1432年與Elizabeth Scobell在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1443年1月3日在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Kirkham于1406年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Robert Kirkham33岁，母亲Agnes de Hankeford27岁。他于1432年与Elizabeth Scobell在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1443年1月3日在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly northwestern): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and East Yorkshire named Kirkham. The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’ or Old Norse heim ‘homestead, estate’.
Possibly an altered form of German Kirchham, a habitational name from either of two places called Kirchham, in Austria or Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Kirkham was born in 1406, in Somerset, England, his father, Robert Kirkham, was 33 and his mother, Agnes de Hankeford, was 27. He married Elizabeth Scobell in 1432, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 January 1443, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Kirkham est né en 1406, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Kirkham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Hankeford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Scobell en 1432, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1443, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Kirkham 1406 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Kirkham 33 und seine Mutter Agnes de Hankeford 27. Er hat 1432 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Scobell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Januar 1443 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Pitminster, Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Kirkham è nato il nel 1406 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Robert Kirkham, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Hankeford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Scobell nel 1432, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 gennaio 1443, nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Kirkhamが1406年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Robert Kirkhamは33歳，母Agnes de Hankefordは27歳であった。1432年にイギリスイギリスデボンでElizabeth Scobellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1443年1月3日にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Kirkham(이)가 1406년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Kirkham(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Hankeford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Elizabeth Scobell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1443년 1월 3일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Kirkham nasceu em 1406, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Kirkham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Hankeford, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Scobell em 1432, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1443, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Kirkham родился в 1406 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Kirkham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Hankeford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Scobell в 1432 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 января 1443 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Kirkham nació en 1406, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Kirkham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes de Hankeford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Scobell en 1432, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de enero de 1443, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
